hero.welcome: WELCOME TO THE CHURCH OF YOUNG PRODIGIES
hero.slide5: Impact your generation and the world

about.subtitle: Who are we?
about.title: A church driven by the vision of ANAGKAZO
about.description: With a clear vision coming from the Great Commission of Matthew 28:19 — “Go and make disciples of all nations” — the Church of Young Prodigies is vision-bound to actively seek lost souls, especially the youth, to welcome, equip, and raise them as true disciples.
about.p1: The Church of Young Prodigies is more than just a gathering place. It's a vibrant community where every young person is called to discover their divine potential and use it for God's glory.
about.p2: Our mission is to build a dedicated generation, rooted in the Word, and equipped to positively impact their environment across the world.
about.verse: « Let no one despise your youth, but be an example to the believers in word, in conduct, in love, in spirit, in faith, in purity. »
about.verse_container: “Let no one despise your youth, but be an example to the believers...” — 1 Timothy 4:12
about.item2_desc: A structured path toward spiritual maturity
about.item3_desc: Equipped to serve beyond the walls of the church

parcours.level3_desc: Committed to the service of the church.
parcours.level4_desc: Solid leader and role model for the community.
parcours.level5_desc: Sent out to plant or lead beyond.

footer.verse: « But you are a chosen generation, a royal priesthood, a holy nation, His own special people, that you may proclaim the praises of Him who called you out of darkness into His marvelous light. »
